modules.name: Module 1: LLM Architecture, Decoding Parameters & Prompting Axioms

topics.title: LLM Architectures & Transformer Systems
subtopics: Tokenization algorithms (Byte-Pair Encoding, WordPiece, SentencePiece)
Embedding layers and Decoder-only transformer stack layouts
Self-Attention mechanism mathematical formulation (Queries, Keys, Values projection matrices, causal attention mask)
Multi-Head Attention (MHA), Multi-Query Attention (MQA), and Grouped-Query Attention (GQA) optimizations
Positional Encodings: Absolute sinusoidal embeddings vs Rotary Position Embeddings (RoPE) and ALiBi
Transformer System blocks: Pre-LN vs Post-LN layer normalization, RMSNorm, and SwiGLU activations

topics.title: LLM Decoding Strategies
subtopics: Beam search widths, Greedy search repetitions loops
Top-K/Top-P temperature sampling math

topics.title: Foundation Models
subtopics: GPT-4, LLaMA-3, Claude-3
Mixture of Experts (MoE) routing gating mechanics

topics.title: Prompt Engineering
subtopics: Zero-shot/Few-shot prompts validation
System Prompts boundaries, and prompt injection exploits

topics.title: Advanced Prompting
subtopics: Structured outputs parsing, Chain of Thought (CoT) logical splits, ReAct loops

modules.name: Module 2: RAG Pipeline Mechanics, Chunking & Evaluation Metrics

topics.title: Vector Embeddings
subtopics: Chunking strategies (Fixed-size, overlap, semantic chunking)
Vector indexing configurations

topics.title: Vector Databases
subtopics: FAISS flat index, ChromaDB, Pinecone metadata filtering
Weaviate hybrid searches

topics.title: RAG Foundations
subtopics: Text chunking, overlap calculations, Dense vector retrieval
Prompt context injections

topics.title: Context Engineering
subtopics: Context window limits, Lost in the Middle phenomena
Prompt context compression

topics.title: RAG Evaluation Metrics
subtopics: Faithfulness validations, answer relevance metrics
Context recall checks using Ragas/TruLens

modules.name: Module 3: Advanced RAG, LangChain Cores & ReAct Agent Loops

topics.title: Advanced RAG
subtopics: Sparse + Dense hybrid search, Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF)
Cross-encoder Reranking models

topics.title: LangChain Core
subtopics: Prompt Templates configurations, LLMChain execution, and dynamic routing chains

topics.title: LangChain Memory Systems
subtopics: ConversationBufferMemory window limits, ConversationSummaryMemory
Redis persistence

topics.title: LangChain Integrations
subtopics: Custom tools definitions schema mappings, document loaders, and vector store retrievers

topics.title: LangChain Agents
subtopics: ReAct loop reasoning cycle, observation parsing, tool execution handlers, and routing

modules.name: Module 4: LangGraph States Workflows, Agent Architectures & MCP Protocols

topics.title: LangGraph Core
subtopics: State management, nodes definition, conditional edges routing
Graph compile/execution loops

topics.title: Agent Architectures
subtopics: Goal decomposition, Planning (Plan-and-Solve), Reflection, and memory systems integration

topics.title: Tool Calling
subtopics: Function calling JSON schemas, argument extraction parameters, and validation checks

topics.title: Agent Protocols
subtopics: Model Context Protocol (MCP) server bindings, tool declarations, and resource endpoints

topics.title: Orchestration Models
subtopics: Single-Agent vs Multi-Agent coordination, supervisor agent configurations, and state sharing

modules.name: Module 5: Fine-Tuning PEFT, RLHF Alignment & MLOps Serving

topics.title: Fine-Tuning PEFT
subtopics: Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT) configurations
LoRA weight adapters matrices ranks (r) and scaling alpha
QLoRA double quantization
Prompt tuning, Prefix tuning, and bottleneck adapters
Fine-tuning memory optimizations (gradient checkpointing)

topics.title: Alignment Reward Loops
subtopics: RLHF PPO reward model feedbacks vs DPO direct preference optimization calculations

topics.title: Quantization Formats
subtopics: Model weight reductions (GPTQ, AWQ, GGUF)
Hardware compatibility constraints

topics.title: LLMOps Serving
subtopics: Inference optimizations (PagedAttention, vLLM)
Triton routing, latency SLA bounds, and guardrails API validation

topics.title: Multimodal Systems
subtopics: Image-text alignment models (CLIP), autonomous workflows, and agent execution safety
